title: DDS Initial & Reconsideration Allowance Rates by State, FY2018–FY2024
description: Long-format (tidy) table of SSA disability allowance rates by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federal fiscal year, FY2018–FY2024. Two metrics: initial-level allowance rate and reconsideration-level allowance rate, both as percents. Extracted from SSA's published allowance-rate workbook (2018-2024.source.xlsx).

columns.name: rows[].code
columns.description: Scope code: 'NATIONAL', SSA region code, or state code/name.

geographic_coverage: National, SSA regions, and individual states

source.title: SSA Disability Allowance Rates by State (initial and reconsideration)

notes: Authoritative: derived 1:1 (no recomputation) from SSA's published allowance-rate workbook 2018-2024.source.xlsx into a tidy long format. Top-level keys: schema='long', metric_family='allowance_rates_by_state', source_file, extracted_at (2026-05-08), fy_range=[2018,2024], rows. Column dot-paths denote fields of each object in the rows array. Precise source URL is SSA's canonical disability-data page; the exact deep link to the source workbook was not recorded in the file — confirm against ssa.gov if exactness matters.
